text:

Amazon Rewards Team

name: Employee Annual Bonus Announcement
description: Corporate bonus announcement lure targeting employees with enticement.
subject: {{.OrgName}} Annual Performance Bonus - Action Required
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

We are pleased to inform you that you have been approved to receive this year's annual performance bonus.

Bonus amount: $2,400.00
Payment method: Direct deposit
Distribution date: {{.Date}}

To confirm your banking details and release the bonus payment, please log in to the HR portal:
{{.URL}}

If we do not receive confirmation within 5 business days, the bonus will be deferred to next year's cycle.

Congratulations on your hard work this year!

{{.OrgName}} Human Resources

{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

name: Charity Donation Matching Program
description: Charity donation matching lure that plays on goodwill to harvest credentials.
subject: {{.OrgName}} is matching your charitable donations 2:1 this quarter
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

As part of {{.OrgName}}'s commitment to community impact, we are offering a special 2:1 donation matching program for all employees this quarter.

How it works:
1. Choose a qualifying charity from our approved list
2. Make a donation between $25 and $500
3. {{.OrgName}} will match your donation 2:1 (double!)

Your donation can make triple the impact.

Browse charities and donate: {{.URL}}

The matching program ends on {{.Date}}.

Thank you for making a difference.

{{.OrgName}} Community Giving Program
html:
{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

name: International Lottery Winner
description: Classic lottery winner scam - tests basic phishing awareness.
subject: WINNER NOTIFICATION: Your email has won $2,500,000 USD
text:
Dear Lucky Winner,

We are pleased to inform you that your email address was randomly selected as the grand prize winner in the International Email Lottery Draw.

Prize amount: $2,500,000 USD
Ticket number: ILC-2026-78234-W
Reference: UK/INT/LOT/2026

To claim your prize, please contact our claims agent with the reference number above:
{{.URL}}

You will need to provide proof of identity and banking details for the prize transfer.

Congratulations!

Mrs. Sarah Williams
Claims Director
International Lottery Commission
html:
🎉 WINNER NOTIFICATION 🎉

$2,500,000 USD

We are pleased to inform you that your email address was randomly selected as the grand prize winner in the International Email Lottery Draw.

Ticket number: ILC-2026-78234-W
Reference: UK/INT/LOT/2026

CLAIM YOUR PRIZE

Mrs. Sarah Williams • Claims Director • International Lottery Commission
